–1. The governor of Ahab’s house
  .Conceals one-hundred prophets persecuted by Jezebel in a cave1Ki 18:3,4
  .Meets Elijah and receives a commission from him1Ki 18:3-16
–2. Head of a family1Ch 3:21
–3. A descendant of Tola1Ch 7:3
–4. Son of Azel1Ch 8:38;9:44
–5. A Levite1Ch 9:16
–6. A Gadite warrior who joined David at Ziklag1Ch 12:9
–7. Father of Ishmaiah1Ch 27:19
–8. A prince of Judah who instructed the people in the law2Ch 17:7-9
–9. A Levite
  .One of the overseers in the repairing of the temple by Josiah2Ch 34:12
–10. A descendant of Joab who returned from BabylonEzr 8:9
–11. A priest who sealed a covenant with Nehemiah to observe God’s lawNe 10:5
–12. A gatekeeper of Jerusalem, under NehemiahNe 12:25
–13. A prophet who prophesied the destruction of EdomOb 1:1
